block_00: The Latest Changes to the IQ Option Platform
block_01:
Dear Client,
We’d like to inform you of the latest changes to our platform:
block_02:
Crypto Exchange
to be split from IQ Option
block_03: After careful consideration we’ve decided to turn the Crypto Exchange into a separate project. The valuable feedback we got from you will inform a new and improved version of the Exchange. Please, stay tuned for future updates.
block_04: In the meantime, as of April 27th, all active orders placed on the Exchange will be cancelled and reimbursed for. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.
block_05:
Your Crypto balance
has been moved to the Hodly Wallet
block_06: Having evaluated client feedback we’ve realized that the option of buying/selling Cryptocurrencies can be better served by Hodly - our multi-currency wallet for all your Crypto needs.
block_07: Your cryptocurrency balance has been moved from IQ Option to the Hodly Wallet. We believe this shift will allow for more smooth, transparent and efficient transactions and an overall better customer experience for you.
block_08: Your Hodly account can be accessed via the mobile app or online at
